name: @dogfood-lab/dogfood-swarm
description: 10-phase parallel-agent protocol runner for testing-os. SQLite-backed control plane, durable receipts, domain-aware orchestration.

scripts.test: node --test control-plane.test.js hardening.test.js verify.test.js verify-fixed.test.js advance.test.js persist.test.js swarm.test.js dispatch-amend-filter.test.js dispatch-state-machine.test.js self-inspection.test.js wave9-defensive-depth.test.js wave10-docs-identity-drift.test.js wave12-observability.test.js wave17-display-layer.test.js wave18-operator-ux.test.js wave23-findings-format.test.js
